restaurants.description: Princess and the Frog themed restaurant with New Orleans jazz, Cajun-inspired cuisine, and live entertainment.

restaurants.name: Royal Palace
restaurants.description: Regal Cinderella-inspired dining room with classic fairy tale elegance and French-influenced cuisine.

restaurants.description: Versailles-inspired garden room that transforms from day to night during dinner with changing lighting and decor.

restaurants.name: Royal Court
restaurants.description: Elegant Princess-themed dining room featuring beautiful artwork and regal atmosphere.

restaurants.name: Enchanted Garden
restaurants.description: Whimsical garden-themed restaurant that transitions from daytime greenhouse to evening garden party.

restaurants.description: Immersive Frozen-themed dining with live performances by Elsa, Anna, Kristoff, and Olaf during your meal.

restaurants.name: Palo
restaurants.description: Upscale Northern Italian restaurant for adults 18+ with stunning ocean views and premium cuisine. Surcharge applies.
